summary: Iteration 49: Pending Receipt Reviews Widget & Generic Mark-Reviewed Endpoint. All backend tests PASSED (8/8). Frontend verified: Owner Dashboard shows 'Pending Receipt Reviews' card with branch groupings, Branch Dashboard shows 'Receipts Awaiting Review' card. Review dialog works with PIN input, notes field, receipt photo previews, and 'Mark as Reviewed' button.

issues: Known hydration warning: <span> wrapping <th>/<tr>/<tbody> — no functional impact, carry-over from previous iterations

feature_verification.GET /api/dashboard/pending-reviews: PASS — Returns items with total_count, by_branch grouping, and proper item structure (id, record_type, record_number, branch_id, branch_name, receipt_count)
feature_verification.GET /api/dashboard/pending-reviews?branc: PASS — Correctly filters to single branch
feature_verification.Frontend Owner Dashboard pending-reviews: PASS — Visible with expandable branch sections (3 branches)
feature_verification.Frontend Owner Dashboard branch grouping: PASS — Shows branch names with pending counts, expandable
feature_verification.Frontend Owner Dashboard Review button: PASS — Opens review dialog with PIN input, notes, receipt previews
feature_verification.Frontend Branch Dashboard items: PASS — Shows only that branch's pending items with Review buttons for admin

critical_code_review_comments: PendingReviewsWidget.js: Well-structured component with proper data-testid attributes, branch grouping logic, and review dialog
DashboardPage.js: Correctly integrates PendingReviewsWidget for both owner (lines 402-414) and branch (lines 692-703) views
dashboard.py pending-reviews endpoint (lines 523-668): Properly queries POs, branch transfers, and expenses with receipt_review_status != 'reviewed' and groups by branch
uploads.py mark-reviewed endpoint (lines 560-612): Correctly validates PIN/TOTP against managers/admins and updates receipt_review_status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pending Reviews Widget fully tested. GET /api/dashboard/pending-reviews returns unreviewed POs, branch transfers, and expenses grouped by branch. POST /api/uploads/mark-reviewed/{record_type}/{record_id} validates admin PIN/TOTP and marks record as reviewed. Frontend shows 'Pending Receipt Reviews' on Owner Dashboard (grouped by branch) and 'Receipts Awaiting Review' on Branch Dashboard (single branch items). Review dialog includes PIN input, notes field, receipt photo previews, and 'Mark as Reviewed' button.
